title: Symbol library
description: Library of schematics symbols for installation diagrams. See https://dev-docs.kicad.org/en/file-formats/sexpr-symbol-lib/index.html

elektrodesigner_symbol_lib.title: Header Section
elektrodesigner_symbol_lib.description: This header section contains library metadata. The elektrodesigner_symbol_lib token indicates that it is ElektroDesigner symbol library file.

version.title: Version
version.description: Version of the symbol library. This value is used to determine if a symbol library needs to be updated.

generator.title: Generator
generator.description: Name of the program that generated the symbol library.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: List of tags for the symbol library

symbols.title: Symbol list
symbols.description: List of symbol definitions that are contained in this symbol library.
